name: mission-msgdat-subidfix
desc: Fix FUN_0054f680 mission-selection UI lookups that request constmsg group 0x6a with enum-biased subIds 0x09..0x15. Group 0x6a is source-backed as six mission labels only, so the UI must render subIds 0..5 and only build six rows.
verified: RE: FUN_0054f680 fills DAT_02221e14 for the mission selector, FUN_00550a00 consumes that local text array for two selected mission labels, and FUN_004afd90 bounds mission selection to values <7. MsgDat source: original JP constmsg group 0x6a has 防衛任務/占領任務/迎撃任務/偵察任務/遊撃任務/撤退任務 and KO overlay has 방위 임무/점령 임무/요격 임무/정찰 임무/유격 임무/철퇴 임무. Live trace g006-msgdat-lookup-final-v2 showed the invalid 0x6a subIds 0x09..0x15 as the visible left mission-list NO DATA path.

patches.note: FUN_0054f680 mission row fill: use subId i, not i+9
FUN_0054f680 mission row fill: stop after six source-backed labels
FUN_0054f680 first mission list: add six rows only
FUN_0054f680 first mission selector initial label -> group 0x6a subId 0
FUN_0054f680 second mission list: add six rows only
FUN_0054f680 second mission selector initial label -> group 0x6a subId 0
